purpose: Defines the structured content-decision object that Phase 5A converts into a validated render spec.

canonicalFields.templateId: Approved template ID from design/TEMPLATE_REGISTRY.json. Do not use layoutId or layout_id.
canonicalFields.exportTarget: Approved target from the selected template. Defaults may be applied by the content engine.
canonicalFields.content: Structured text payload shaped by the selected template.
canonicalFields.footerId: Defaults to mandatory_honest_framing and must not be overridden for social content.

defaults.exportTarget: first export target allowed by the selected template

safetyRules: No override of emergency warning status.
No asset ID that is absent from ASSET_INDEX.json.
No source ID that is absent from SOURCE_INDEX.json.
